Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Embracing Bayesian methods in clinical trials 74 upvotes, 8 comments
  2. Capability-Based Security for Redox: Namespace and CWD as Capabilities 24 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. Improving Composer through real-time RL 30 upvotes, 2 comments
  4. ISBN Visualization 79 upvotes, 11 comments
  5. Solving Semantle with the Wrong Embeddings 13 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Explore the Hidden World of Sand 169 upvotes, 35 comments
  7. Meow.camera 179 upvotes, 41 comments
  8. Building FireStriker: Making Civic Tech Free 84 upvotes, 18 comments
  9. Installing a Let's Encrypt TLS certificate on a Brother printer with Certbot 180 upvotes, 47 comments
  10. Velxio 2.0 – Emulate Arduino, ESP32, and Raspberry Pi 3 in the Browser 71 upvotes, 16 comments
  11. Nashville library launches Memory Lab for digitizing home movies 90 upvotes, 23 comments
  12. Desk for people who work at home with a cat 320 upvotes, 126 comments
  13. Gzip decompression in 250 lines of Rust 113 upvotes, 40 comments
  14. Show HN: Twitch Roulette – Find live streamers who need views the most 32 upvotes, 8 comments
  15. Anatomy of the .claude/ folder 354 upvotes, 182 comments
  16. LG's new 1Hz display is the secret behind a new laptop's battery life 97 upvotes, 46 comments
  17. DOJ confirms FBI Director Kash Patel's personal email was hacked 128 upvotes, 66 comments
  18. The Future of SCIP 28 upvotes, 11 comments
  19. Make macOS consistently bad (unironically) 265 upvotes, 179 comments
  20. Everything old is new again: memory optimization 179 upvotes, 124 comments
  21. People inside Microsoft are fighting to drop mandatory Microsoft Account 487 upvotes, 386 comments
  22. Hold on to Your Hardware 562 upvotes, 458 comments
  23. Matlab Alternatives 2026: Benchmarks, GPU, Browser and Compatibility Compared 17 upvotes, 8 comments
  24. ‘Energy independence feels practical’: Europeans building mini solar farms 209 upvotes, 189 comments
  25. Automatically generate all 3D print files for organizing a drawer 17 upvotes, 11 comments
  26. Telnyx package compromised on PyPI 77 upvotes, 85 comments
  27. Fets and Crosses: Tic-Tac-Toe built from 2458 discrete transistors 4 upvotes, 1 comments
  28. Slovenia becomes first EU country to introduce fuel rationing 131 upvotes, 175 comments
  29. 21,864 Yugoslavian .yu domains 72 upvotes, 91 comments
